<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band07_chunk002.pdf#page=22 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band07 p92 -->

[[File:Band07_chunk002_p022_img001.jpg|thumb]]

[[File:Band07_chunk002_p022_img002.jpg|thumb|Ausschnitt aus Fresko D]]

[[File:Band07_chunk002_p022_img003.jpg|thumb]]

[[File:Band07_chunk002_p022_img004.jpg|thumb|Ausschnitt aus Fresko]]

----
9:
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band07 p93 -->
